lines.speaker: Berry
lines.text: Good day, adventurer. If you have any questions, I'm sure Lars will be more than happy to answer them. He's in the building to the south.

lines.speaker: Berry
lines.text: Also don't forget to visit my sister's axe shop. She works in the same building as Lars.

lines.speaker: Berry
lines.text: Welcome to the Woodcutting Guild, adventurer.
